description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front features a driveway leading to a single-car garage, a paved walkway, and a small landscaped yard with trees and shrubs. Large windows are arranged in horizontal bands, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious wooden deck with outdoor furniture and a swimming pool, creating a private recreational area. The exterior is finished in neutral tones, with a mix of light gray, white, and natural wood accents. The property is surrounded by several mature trees, enhancing its suburban residential character.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, landscaped yard, and a backyard deck with a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the transition to the backyard with pool and deck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, outdoor furniture, swimming pool, and large windows facing the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, deck, and additional landscaping, with the garage and driveway visible in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal bands
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small porch, paved steps, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaping.
